nasb.text: And with great power the apostles were giving testimony to the resurrection of the Lord Jesus, and abundant grace was upon them all.

esv.text: And with great power the apostles were giving their testimony to the resurrection of the Lord Jesus, and great grace was upon them all.

cnv.text: 使徒大有能力，為主耶穌的復活作見證，眾人都蒙了大恩。

ccb.text: 使徒充满能力，继续为主耶稣复活的事做见证，上帝也赐下极大的恩典给众人。

csbs.text: 使徒们大有能力地为主耶稣的复活做见证，并且在他们每个人身上都有极大的恩典。
